# Kevin Quinn — kevinquinn.fun

> Writer. Product-minded Software Engineer. Professional Dabbler. Usually confused.

**Last updated:** 2026-05-22

## About

Kevin Quinn is a software engineer and writer. This site is where he thinks out loud —
long-form essays, short takes, quick learnings, and the occasional recipe.

He also co-hosts a podcast: [The Facade Project](https://facadeproject.com/).

## What's here

- **Blog** — main writing, mix of personal essays and tech opinions
- **Jottings** — short-form takes, quotes, and half-formed thoughts
- **TIL** — quick "today I learned" technical notes
- **Recipes** — small collection of things worth cooking again

## Recent thinking (as of 2026-05-22)

Lately Kevin has been writing a lot about AI and agentic engineering — specifically how
to use AI agents effectively without losing ownership of the work (agent skills design,
docs as a superpower with LLMs, security practices in Claude Code, trust and autonomy
tradeoffs in agentic coding). Alongside that: a thread on productivity systems
(TickTick, todo design), and more personal essays on living deliberately — staying
close to friends geographically, disconnecting from frictionless convenience, and
whether consuming ideas has crowded out producing them.
